member.name: T:KazSign.KazSignError
member.summary: Error codes returned by KAZ-SIGN operations

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSignParameters.GetSecretKeyBytes(KazSign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get secret key size in bytes for the given security level

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSignParameters.GetPublicKeyBytes(KazSign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get public key size in bytes for the given security level

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSignParameters.GetSignatureOverhead(KazSign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get signature overhead in bytes for the given security level

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSignParameters.GetHashBytes(KazSign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get hash output size in bytes for the given security level

member.name: T:KazSign.NativeMethods
member.summary: Native P/Invoke declarations for KAZ-SIGN library

member.name: T:KazSign.KazSignException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a KAZ-SIGN operation fails

member.name: P:KazSign.KazSignException.ErrorCode
member.summary: The error code returned by the native library

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSigner.#ctor(KazSign.SecurityLevel,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new KazSigner with the specified security level
member.param: If true, automatically initialize the random state

member.name: P:KazSign.KazSigner.SecretKeyBytes
member.summary: Size of secret key in bytes

member.name: P:KazSign.KazSigner.PublicKeyBytes
member.summary: Size of public key in bytes

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSigner.IsInitialized
member.summary: Check if the random state is initialized

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSigner.Verify(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Verify a signature and extract the message
member.returns: True if signature is valid, false otherwise

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSigner.Hash(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Hash a message using the appropriate hash function for this security level

member.name: M:KazSign.KazSigner.Dispose
member.summary: Clear the random state and release resources
